methods.name: task_contract_driver
methods.docs: Construct a fully-wired TaskContractDriver for the requested items_dir. Wires FsTaskContractReader and FsImplCatalogSignalReader from that items_dir into a PreReviewGateInteractor and wraps it as Arc<dyn PreReviewGateService>.

methods.name: task_contract_check
methods.docs: Wire and invoke the pre-review conformance gate check. Constructs a TaskContractDriver via task_contract_driver(items_dir), then dispatches TaskContractInput::Check { group, track_id }. The driver parses CLI strings, calls the use case, and renders Passed/Blocked outcomes as CommandOutcome.

TaskContractCompositionRoot.docs: Composition root for the task-contract command family. Wires FsTaskContractReader, FsImplCatalogSignalReader, PreReviewGateInteractor, and TaskContractDriver for the sotp task-contract check subcommand.
